metaData.Ingredients:
• Active Ingredients (Purpose - Sunscreen): Avobenzone (3%), Homosalate (10%), Octisalate (5%), Octocrylene (4.5%), Oxybenzone (4%)
• Inactive Ingredients: Water, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Dimethicone, Potassium Cetyl Phosphate, Benzyl Alcohol, Silica, Diethylhexyl 2, 6-Naphthalate, Dimethicone/PEG-10/15 Crosspolymer, Trisiloxane, Cetyl Dimethicone, Beeswax, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Polyacrylate, Xanthan Gum, Ethylhexyl Stearate, Acrylates/C12-22 Alkyl Methacrylate Copolymer, Behenyl Alcohol, Trideceth-6, Disodium EDTA, Glycerate Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Caprylyl Glycol, Chlorphenesin, Fragrance
metaData.Key Information:
• Comes with Helioplex Broad Spectrum UVA/UVB sun protection with SPF 50
• Provides beach-strength sun protection and defends against signs of water damage
• Lightweight, fast absorbing, ideal for outdoor skin protection
• Oil-free and PABA free
metaData.Preparation:
1. Apply generously 15 minutes before sun exposure
2. Re-apply after 80 minutes of swimming or sweating / immediately after towel drying / at least every 2 hours

product.description: Neutrogena Ultra Sheer Dry Touch Sunscreen SPF 50+ PA+++ is a breakthrough in sun protection. Stabilized with Helioplex, it provides superior balanced broad spectrum protection against skin-aging UVA and burning UVB rays. Dry Touch Technology gives  an ultra-light  and non-shiny finish. This lightweight sunscreen has a light fresh scent and is gentle enough even for sensitive skin.

product.description:
• Mattifying, Non-Drying Humidity-responsive technology - Optimizes skin hydration levels based on environmental humidity
• In Humid environment: Absorb excess moisture to prevent stickiness
• In Dry environment: Release moisture to prevent dryness
• Airy light mousse texture spreads easily for smooth & non-sticky skin
• Strong protection against UVA & UVB
• For Face & Body
• Oil Control - Prevents oily shine (caused by excess sebum)
• Hydrating with Hyaluronic acid, Vitamin C derivative & Butylene Glycol
• Prevents makeup smudging
• Can be used as a makeup primer
• Brightens skin & blurs pores with pore blurring powder
• Prevents dark spots caused by sun exposure
• Very water resistant (for 80 minutes), yet easy to remove with soap (face/body)
• Non-comedogenic tested
• Allergy tested
• Subtle floral fragrance

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Alcohol, Butylene Glycol, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Silica, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Diisopropyl Sebacate, Glyceryl Stearate, Peg-75, Sodium Potassium Aluminum Silicate, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Titanium Dioxide (Nano), Dextrin Palmitate, Dimethicone, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Agar, Phenoxyethanol, Titanium Dioxide, Sodium Polyacrylate Starch, Sodium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate,  Cetyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Disodium Edta, Aluminum Hydroxide, Stearic Acid, Stearyl Alcohol, Polysilicone-9, Propanediol, Glyceryl Behenate, Polyvinyl Alcohol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Hydroxide, Sorbitan  Distearate, Fragrance, Aminomethyl Propanol, Sodium Stearoxy Pg-Hydroxyethylcellulose Sulfonate, Glutamic Acid, Stearoyl Glutamic Acid, Ceratonia Siliqua (Carob) Gum, Sodium Methyl Stearoyl Taurate, Bht, Arginine, Maltose, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Sodium Hyaluronate, Methylparaben
metaData.Key Information: With Singapore’s high UV index, oily-skin consumers need a sunscreen that protects while keeping skin matte throughout the day. Biore UV Aqua Rich Airy Hold Cream offers SPF50+ PA++++ to protect against strong UV exposure, while its unique technology adapts to environmental humidity to balance hydration—mattifying the skin without causing dryness. Ideal for Singapore’s hot and humid climate.
metaData.Preparation: Squeeze 1 pump (1cm width) and spread evenly on face after moisturizer and before applying makeup. Avoid the eye area. Avoid direct contact with clothes, put on clothes after sunscreen dries. For best results, reapply at frequent intervals, or after perspiration, swimming or towel drying. As with all sunscreens, cleanse thoroughly with makeup remover or cleanser (face/body wash). Close cap tightly after use.
metaData.SAP Product Name: BIORE UV AQUA RICH AIRY HOLD CREAM SPF50+ 70G
metaData.Storage Information:
•Keep away from high temperature and direct sunlight.
• If skin irritation occurs, discontinue use.
• Do not stay too long in the sun, even while using a sunscreen product. Over-exposure to the sun is a serious health threat.
• The use of sunscreen is one way to reduce the dangers of sun exposure.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Octocrylene, Homosalate, Butyloctyl Salicylate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Proplene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate, Acrylates Crosspolymer, Ethylhexyl Triazine, Acrylates/Dimenthicone Copolymer (and) Cylopentasiloxane, Lauryl PEG-9 Polydimethylsilxyethyl Dimenthicone, Polymethylsisesquioxane, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenol Triazine, Caprylyl Methicone, Polysilicone-15, Butylene Glycol, Punica Granatum Flower Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride (and) Saussurea Involucrata Extract, Fragrance, Pentyene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-4 Isostearate, Bisabolol, Phenoxyethanol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Disodium EDTA, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Panthenol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride (and) Laminaria Ochroleuca Extract, Ectoin, Sodium Hyaluronate
metaData.Key Information:
• Lightweight, non-sticky and comfortable
• Instantly cut thorough water and forms a protective barrier from UV rays on skin
• Quick dry formula allows sunscreen to quickly adhere to wet skin , ensuring it does not drip or leave white marks
• Works on wet and dry skin
• Free from alcohol, colorant, paraben and oxybenzone
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Shake 4 - 5 times before use
2. Hold can 6 - 8 inches away from skin and spray onto body evenly
3. Spray onto palm and apply evenly on face
4. For desired result, re-apply as needed or after towel dry, vigorous outdoor activity
• Caution:
1. Avoid inhaling mist
2. Avoid spraying into eyes
3. If accdientially sprayed into eyes, wash with water thoroughly
4. If irritation occurs, discontinue use ad consult a doctor
5. Do not spray directly onto face
6. Do not use on broken skin
7. Do not spray on naked flame and incandescent material
9. Do not use use near heat, flame, or while smoking
10. Do not use this product in well-ventilated areas where no electrical appliances are in operation
11. Do not incinerate or puncture the can even when empty
metaData.SAP Product Name: SUNPLAY SPORT UV MIST SPF120 165ML

Keep out of reach of children
